title: Homeshopa Laundry Baskets Pop Up Mesh Washing Bag, Foldable Laundry Hamper Bin Bag with Durable Handles & Side Pocket, Collapsible Clothes Toy Tidy Storage Organiser, Assorted Colours (Pack of 3)
features: POP-UP MESH LAUNDRY BASKET: Add to your daily necessities, Organise your life with this pop up laundry basket. This folding laundry washing bag is ideal for holding large loads of laundry and will help you keep your room tidy. Keep your floor and chairs free from dirty clothes by placing them inside the collapsible laundry baskets.

DURABLE STRUCTURE: This storage laundry bag is made of nylon, so there's no need to worry about tears forming when it rubs against an uneven surface; additionally, this mesh laundry bin is framed with strong wires, giving it a sturdy appearance. The laundry basket organiser is strong and durable, and it can hold daily dirty clothes.

DRY AND BREATHABLE DESIGN - The high quality mesh aids in ventilation and protects laundries from mildew and moth damage. It allows for maximum air circulation, keeping clothes fresh and odor-free. To keep clothes fresh and reduce odour.

SPACE-SAVING DESIGN: When not in use, our collapsible washing basket folds into a small round flat, and the spring steel wire rack is easy to fold and store, and it can be folded and stored as a whole without taking up any space. It is also very convenient to transport; With an extra side pocket design, you can carry laundry additives/detergent, a book, toys, or whatever you want.

SEVERAL USES FOR ONE BASKET: A mesh hamper basket adds superior quality and versatility to your space. It can be used for storage of daily clothes in closets, bathrooms, and bedrooms, as well as storage baskets for small toys and sundries (Kids Bedroom Furniture), Baby Stuff, and is also ideal for university dormitories and small apartment.
description: Is your room strewn with dirty clothes that need to be laundered? Are you still using a brittle plastic laundry bag or a laundry basket that takes up a lot of room in your home? Now switch to this space-saving foldable Popup laundry basket organiser! FEATURES HIGH QUALITY: This laundry basket is made of a high-density mesh cloth and a high-quality bolded galvanised steel frame. All details are intended to produce a good and stronger product. BREATHABLE MESH CONSTRUCTION: This breathable nylon mesh design, which allows for air circulation, eliminates moisture and unpleasant laundry odours. SIDE POCKET: The side pocket provides additional storage space for laundry accessories. DUAL REINFORCED HANDLES: With two heavy-duty handles, this hamper basket can be carried with just one hand if necessary. FOLDABLE DESIGN: Because this collapsible laundry basket is foldable, it is easy to store when not in use. This feature makes it convenient to transport, especially when travelling. WIDE APPLICATION: You can use this laundry hampers to store anything you want, such as baby clothes, baby toys, books, or even empty water bottles, and use it as a kids laundry hamper in your bedroom, bathroom, college dorm, camping, hotel, or travel.
